summary: Iteration 76: Phase 5 Batch Close Feature - Backend (16/16 tests PASS) and Frontend verified. All batch close functionality working: POST /api/daily-close/batch validates 2+ dates, GET /api/daily-close-preview/batch returns aggregated data with per-day breakdown. Frontend shows 'Close All as Group' button, BATCH badge on steps, reason field, and combined Z-Report with Cash Drawer Reconciliation. Phase 1-4 regression tests also pass.

PHASE_5_BATCH_PREVIEW_API.description: GET /api/daily-close-preview/batch returns aggregated data for multiple dates
tests: Returns dates[], date_from, date_to fields
Returns daily_breakdown with per-day sales_by_method breakdown
Returns aggregated totals: total_cash_sales, total_expenses, expected_counter
Requires branch_id and dates parameters (400 if missing)
Returns digital_by_platform and total_digital_today
Rejects single date with 'Batch close requires 2+ dates' error
Rejects empty dates array
PIN validation works (wrong PIN rejected)

PHASE_5_FRONTEND_BATCH_MODE.description: Frontend shows batch mode UI when clicking 'Close All as Group'
tests: Multi-day banner shows X unclosed days detected
'Close All as Group' button visible (data-testid=close-as-group-btn)
Clicking button selects all unclosed dates with checkmarks
BATCH badge shows on step title
'Reason for batch close *' field visible (data-testid=batch-reason-input)
Date range displayed: '2026-02-22 to 2026-02-28 (7 days combined)'
'Close One by One' button to exit batch mode visible

PHASE_5_FRONTEND_ZREPORT_BATCH.description: Step 7 Z-Report shows combined data in batch mode
tests: BATCH badge on Step 7 title
CASH DRAWER RECONCILIATION section visible
Opening Float, Cash Sales, Total Cash In, Expenses displayed
Expected in Drawer calculated correctly
Expenses section shows category breakdown
Daily log returns all payment methods with by_payment_method summary
Credit invoices have items array and payment status
Expenses have category field for grouping
Preview has cash breakdown fields
Unclosed days detection works

test_categories: Batch Preview API (5 tests): aggregated data, daily_breakdown, totals, validation, digital payments
Batch Close Validation (3 tests): single date rejection, empty dates, PIN validation
Phase 1-4 Regression (5 tests): payment methods, credit items, expenses, preview, unclosed days
Batch Preview Content (3 tests): credit invoices, expenses list, sales category breakdown

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/daily-close-preview/batch returns comprehensive daily_breakdown per date
Frontend CloseWizardPage.js correctly implements batch mode with BATCH badge
Batch reason field is required before close (frontend validation)
Step 7 Z-Report shows aggregated Cash Drawer Reconciliation in batch mode

test_credentials.test_dates: 2026-02-22 to 2026-02-28 (7 unclosed days with diverse data)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing IPIL BRANCH data with unclosed days
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 verified Phase 5 (Batch Close) feature. Backend: POST /api/daily-close/batch validates 2+ dates, rejects single date with clear error. GET /api/daily-close-preview/batch returns aggregated data with daily_breakdown showing per-day sales by payment method. Frontend: 'Close All as Group' button triggers batch mode with BATCH badge, reason field, date pills with checkmarks, and combined Z-Report. Phase 1-4 regression passed. NOTE: Did NOT actually close any days - only tested validation and preview to preserve data. To test actual batch close, use dates that can be closed.
